homelab restic restore-test fixture
====================================

This file is the canonical reference content for the weekly restic
restore-test. The matching copy on airbase lives at:

    /data/restic-fixture/restic-known-good.txt

…and is included in every restic backup the same way real workloads are.
The restore-test workflow restores ONLY this path from a randomly chosen
snapshot, then `diff`s the restored file against this committed copy.

If you change either copy without changing the other, the workflow will
flag the drift on its next run. That is the point.

DO NOT remove without also updating:
  - scripts/restic-restore-test.sh   (KNOWN_GOOD path)
  - .gitea/workflows/restore-test.yml
  - ansible/roles/restic_host_job/   (deploys the on-disk twin)

Last edited: 2026-05-10
Maintainer: umut.erdem
